title: BUG P1: call_timeout sends BREAK but does not drain server response -> reused connection reads stale packets (8 sites; parity divergence from protocol.pyx drain+reset)
close_reason: Fixed in commit c518224 (branch fix-timeout-drain). All 8 *_call_timeout arms + ping_with_timeout now break_and_drain: send BREAK, then discard in-flight DATA responses until the break-ack MARKER, run the RESET dance, and consume the trailing ORA-01013 error packet — leaving the wire clean and the connection reusable (mirrors protocol.pyx _break_external/_receive_packet/_reset 449-451,507-557). A failed recovery drain (second timeout) marks the conn dead and returns Error::ConnectionClosed (DPY-4011). Classification: Error::CallTimeout is no longer is_connection_lost() (now is_transient) to match python-oracledb DPY-4024 keeping the session alive; ConnectionClosed is the connection-lost variant. Regression tests (before=fail proven via drain-skip mutation + bare-break contrast, after=pass): hermetic break_and_drain unit tests + live tests/reuse_after_call_timeout.rs (2s sleep / 500ms timeout then select 7+5=12 on same conn). Gate green: fmt, clippy --workspace --no-deps -D warnings, cargo test --workspace. Parity sentinels exact: test_1100 57p/5s, test_2200 39p, test_4300 73p; timeout tests test_1131/5331/5545/2459 pass.

BUG: thin decoder mis-frames multi-packet WIDE-row results past ~1500 rows (encoded NUMBER too long / truncated TTC payload)
close_reason: Fixed in commit 3cdc451 (branch fix-widerow). Root cause: read_data_response_boundary (crates/oracledb/src/lib.rs) terminated multi-packet reassembly on an UNGUARDED trailing-byte check -- any DATA packet whose post-flags payload merely ended in TNS_MSG_TYPE_END_OF_RESPONSE (29/0x1d) or TNS_MSG_TYPE_FLUSH_OUT_BINDS (19/0x13) was treated as end-of-response, truncating wide multi-packet results. Reference impl/thin/packet.pyx::has_end_of_response guards the 0x1d check on packet_size == HEADER+3 (lone marker byte). Fix: pure data_packet_ends_response() ends the response only on the END_OF_RESPONSE/EOF data flag or a minimal lone-marker packet; flush-out-binds detected from the terminal byte of the reassembled stream. Regression: 3 hermetic unit tests (lib.rs) + live wide_row_multipacket.rs (3000x 20-col rows over 512B SDU) -- all FAIL before / PASS after. Parity sentinels green (1100 57p/5s, 2200 39p, 4300 73p, 8000 82p).
